nodes.name: ShapeHeuristicAnalyzer
nodes.description: Validate board ownership via fabric, infer shape type from aspect ratio heuristics

nodes.name: AspectRatioCalculator
nodes.description: Compute aspect ratio (height/width), determine heuristic category

nodes.name: UnsupportedElementHandler
nodes.description: Audit unknown shape types in xiigen-unsupported-elements for future support

nodes.name: CoordinateNormalizerMiro
nodes.description: Transform infinite-canvas (negative-allowed) coords to viewport-relative percentages

nodes.name: ConfidenceScoringEngine
nodes.description: Score heuristic confidence based on aspect-ratio certainty and rule matching

nodes.name: HeuristicMetadataRecorder
nodes.description: Store heuristic analysis with confidence, rules applied, and audit trail

nodes.name: ShapeProcessingGate
nodes.description: Validate all heuristics complete, confidence threshold met, emit ShapeTypeInferred

nodes.name: OutboxPublisher
nodes.description: Emit CloudEvents to queue fabric after all storage (DNA-8 outbox pattern)
